title: Unique 26192 Foil Stamped Paper Napkins-16.5 cm-Bright Triangle Birthday Party-16 Count (Pack of 1), Multicolour, Mittel
features: Pack of 16 Bright Triangle Birthday Party Napkins
Paper napkins measure 16.5 cm x 16.5 cm
Ideal for wiping spills at any birthday party
Disposable napkins make cleaning up quick and easy
Combine with other Bright Triangle Birthday party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Keep your party space looking colourful with our Bright Triangle Birthday Napkins. These 2-ply paper napkins feature foil-stamped text reading “Happy Birthday” surrounded by colourful triangles, making them a stylish choice for your special occasion. Use these to add a celebratory touch to your table settings, or leave a stack of them on your buffet table for guests to help themself. Find more ways to celebrate in style and shop the rest of our birthday party supplies. Safety Warning Do Not Microwave
